name: Getting Started
description: Starter resources for new Partners who need the first clear path through the Partner Enablement OS.

name: Daily Actions
description: Repeatable Partner activity resources for outreach, follow-up, review, and execution rhythm.

name: Lead Generation
description: Resources for identifying business owners, referral sources, and Partner opportunities without making unsafe claims.

name: Referral Partner Outreach
description: Assets for starting responsible conversations with bank managers, accountants, attorneys, equipment dealers, and local business connectors.

name: Product Training
description: Training resources that help Partners explain funding options carefully, accurately, and without guarantees.

name: CRM & Tracking
description: Templates and resources for tracking activity, opportunities, follow-up, Partner status, and weekly review cycles.

name: Social Media Assets
description: Partner-facing social copy and content prompts designed to create education-first business funding conversations.

name: Email Scripts
description: Email templates for introductions, follow-ups, referral partner outreach, and responsible client conversations.

name: Compliance
description: Safe language, restricted language, disclaimers, and rewrite examples for responsible funding-related communication.

name: Deal Submission
description: Resources for preparing business owner information and routing opportunities through the proper process.

name: FAQ
description: Plain-English answers to common Partner, referral source, and business owner questions.

name: Recommended Tools
description: Suggested tools, worksheets, prompts, and future interactive resources for Partner enablement.
